info.title: Notedown.Cli
info.description: Notedown is a set of markdown note-taking conventions that double as a light data format. This tool enables programmatic interaction with notes based on those conventions.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Notedown is a set of conventions for notes in Markdown. This cli provides tools for treating such notes as data

commands.name: extract-tags
commands.description: Get content (list items, paragraphs, sections, etc) with the given tag

arguments.name: input-file-pattern
arguments.description: File(s) to extract tagged data from. A file path or glob pattern.
